description:
## Problem

Server tests are completely excluded from ESLint via `globalIgnores(['tests/**'])` in `apps/server/eslint.config.mjs`. This means `as any` casts, unused imports, and other quality issues go undetected. Agents write sloppy test code because there's no lint gate.

Additionally, tests use `as unknown as ServiceType` or `as any` for mock objects instead of proper typed mock factories, making tests fragile and hard to maintain.

## Scope

### Phase 1: Enable test linting
- Remove `tests/**` from `globalIgnores` in `apps/server/eslint.config.mjs`
- Add a test-specific override block with relaxed rules:
  - `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`: `warn` (not error)
  - Other rules inherited from source config
- Fix any new errors that surface (likely minimal since most rules were already warn)
- Verify CI passes

### Phase 2: Typed mock factories
- Create `apps/server/tests/helpers/mock-factories.ts` with typed factory functions:
  - `createMockFeatureLoader(overrides?)` returns `Partial<FeatureLoader>` with vi.fn() stubs
  - `createMockSettingsService(overrides?)` returns `Partial<SettingsService>`
  - `createMockProjectService(overrides?)` returns `Partial<ProjectService>`
  - `createMockEventEmitter()` returns a typed test emitter
  - `createMockMetricsService()` returns `Partial<MetricsService>`
- Factories return properly typed partials — no `as any` needed
- Migrate existing tests to use factories (incremental, start with ceremony-flows and completion-detector tests)

### Phase 3: Eliminate remaining `as any` in tests
- Audit all test files for `as any` usage
- Replace with typed factories or proper type narrowing
- Escalate test lint rule to `error` once clean

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Server tests are linted in CI
- [ ] `no-explicit-any` is `warn` in tests, `error` in source
- [ ] Mock factory helpers exist and are used by at least 5 test files
- [ ] No new `as any` usage in tests going forward (enforced by warn + code review)

## Files to Modify
- `apps/server/eslint.config.mjs`
- `apps/server/tests/helpers/mock-factories.ts` (new)
- `apps/server/tests/unit/services/ceremony-flows.test.ts`
- `apps/server/tests/unit/services/completion-detector-service.test.ts`
- Various other test files (incremental migration)
title: Test infrastructure: lint coverage + typed mock factories
